name: Unified Travel Assistant
description: Lightweight multi-agent travel assistant with flight search, hotel search, deals advisor, support, and farewell agents.

Supervisor.description: Routes user requests to the appropriate specialist agent

Flight_Search.description: Helps users find and book flights

Hotel_Search.description: Helps users find and book hotels

Deals_Advisor.description: Finds the best travel deals and discounts

Support_Agent.description: Helps users with issues and problems

Farewell_Agent.description: Ends conversations gracefully with a warm goodbye
